title: Rearrange Array to Maximize Prefix Score
titleCn: 重排数组以得到最大前缀分数

testcases.input: nums = [2,-1,0,1,-3,3,-3] Output: 6 Explanation: We can rearrange the array into nums = [2,3,1,-1,-3,0,-3]. prefix = [2,5,6,5,2,2,-1], so the score is 6. It can be shown that 6 is the maximum score we can obtain.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: We can rearrange the array into nums = [2,3,1,-1,-3,0,-3]. prefix = [2,5,6,5,2,2,-1], so the score is 6. It can be shown that 6 is the maximum score we can obtain.

testcases.input: nums = [-2,-3,0] Output: 0 Explanation: Any rearrangement of the array will result in a score of 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: Any rearrangement of the array will result in a score of 0.
